description: Boid flocking simulation — control 200+ autonomous agents through procedural landscape, collect energy, avoid predators
prompt: Build a boid flocking simulation game with HTML5 canvas. Player controls a leader entity among 200+ autonomous boids following separation/alignment/cohesion rules. Scrolling 2000x2000 map with camera following player. Collect green energy crystals (boids near crystal = more points). Red predator entities scatter boids on contact. Yellow spawn portals recruit new boids. Minimap in corner. Game ends when swarm drops below 20. Dark theme with purple boids, cyan leader, procedural landscape.

tasks.subject: Create boid flocking system with 3 rules
Create player control and camera system
Create world map and procedural entities
Create predator AI and collision systems
